description: The TextDisplayInterface component is used to specify what the user's favorite display of clipboard contents should be when pasting text not into a text field and the text is not a link.

fields.ItemName: The name of this favoritable item.
fields.SpawningUser: The user that spawned this favoritable item.
fields.SpawningUserID: The field containing the ID of the user that spawned this favoritable item.
fields.IsInstance: Whether this item was spawned by the player (false) or was spawned by the game as part of the favorites system (true).
fields.Heading: The field to fill with what the header text is upon spawn.
fields.Text: The field to fill with what the text the user pasted was upon spawn.
fields.RTF: The field to fill with whether the text should be interpreted as Rich Text Format. This is usually the RTF field on a text rendering Component for the UI.

usage: Spawn the default resonite one from resonite essentials and edit it, or attach a new one and create a UI for it yourself. Once done, save to your inventory and set as your text display to make it your active one.
